item.title: Circle receives OCC approval to open a federally chartered national trust bank for digital asset custody
SEC plans to propose crypto safe harbor rule this month, exempting select token activities from securities registration
U.S. GENIUS Act rulemaking deadline falls on July 18, determining which stablecoin issuers can operate domestically
House Financial Services Committee schedules July 17 CLARITY Act field hearing in New York; Senate floor vote unset
MiCA took full effect July 1 with only 194 of 3,000-plus crypto firms holding EU authorization
BONK DAO lost $20M in treasury tokens after an attacker spent $4.4M on governance tokens to force a malicious vote
Summer.fi suspended Lazy Summer vaults after a $6M flash loan exploit drained USDC yield pools
EDX Markets raised $76M in Series C funding led by SBI Holdings to expand its institutional crypto trading platform
Ethical hackers patched an Aptos flaw that could have exposed $70B in assets to a validator attack costing $3,000
BIS study finds stablecoin flows now move T-bill markets, with a $3.5B inflow shifting three-month Treasury yields
JPMorgan disclosed a 64% increase in BlackRock IBIT holdings to 5.3M shares worth $343M in its Q1 2026 filing
Taiko cross-chain bridge restored 10 days after a $1.7M exploit that allowed attackers to forge withdrawal proofs
Ethereum Institutional nonprofit launched to give banks and asset managers a neutral point of contact on blockchain
UK traders risk losing crypto platform access as MiCA's EU licensing deadline leaves most exchanges unlicensed
Sberbank plans a state-controlled crypto wallet to serve as Russia's primary regulated retail on-ramp
